title: scrophularia macrantha
intro: Scrophularia macrantha, also known as the large figwort or common figwort, is a flowering plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of alkaloids such as scropol and scropine. The health benefits of Scrophularia macrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia macrantha can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
